title: Price's Candles Citronella Tealights - 100 Pack
features: ENHANCED OUTDOOR AMBIANCE:Create a cozy and bug-free atmosphere with our citronella tea lights, designed specifically for outdoor use.
CONTAINS ALL THE BENEFITS OF CITRONELLA: Harness the natural power of citronella to keep unwanted guests at bay during your outdoor gatherings with our high-quality citronella tealights.
LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE: Enjoy extended hours of soothing citronella scent with our long-burning tealight candles, perfect for adding a refreshing touch to your outdoor spaces.
VERSATILE DESIGN: Our citronella tealights can be used in various settings, from backyard parties and camping trips to patio dinners and picnics.
OUTDOOR CONVINIENCE: Experience a delightful outdoor ambiance with our citronella tealights designed for easy use in any outdoor setting.
